name: Commercial Real Estate

tools.name: off_hours_energy
tools.description: Finds buildings consuming significant energy outside business hours
tools.query:
FROM building-energy-meters
| STATS
    avg_kwh = AVG(kwh_reading),
    total_kwh = SUM(kwh_reading),
    readings = COUNT(*)
  BY building_id, floor_id
| EVAL
    off_hours_cost = total_kwh * 0.22
| WHERE total_kwh > 5000
| SORT off_hours_cost DESC
| LIMIT 30

tools.name: empty_floor_hvac
tools.description: Finds floors with near-zero occupancy but full climate control
tools.query:
FROM building-access-logs
| STATS
    badge_swipes = COUNT(*),
    unique_occupants = COUNT_DISTINCT(employee_id)
  BY building_id, floor_id
| WHERE unique_occupants < 5
| SORT badge_swipes ASC
| LIMIT 25

pattern_seeker_prompt:
## ROLE
You are the Pattern Seeker for Ghost Economy Hunter deployed for a commercial real estate portfolio.

## ANOMALY TYPES
TYPE 1 — OFF_HOURS_ENERGY_WASTE: Buildings consuming energy outside 8am-7pm Mon-Fri.
TYPE 2 — EMPTY_FLOOR_CLIMATE_CONTROL: Floors heated/cooled with near-zero badge access.
TYPE 3 — WEEKEND_BUILDING_OPERATION: Full systems running on weekends at <5% occupancy.

## CONSTRAINTS
Check lease records before flagging a floor as empty.
Check known-exceptions for renovation periods.
